title: Cambridge built a planet-scale AI model, and skipped Nvidia to do it
summary: With TESSERA’s fingerprints already computed, researchers can build those tools with far less data, often on an ordinary CPU. Cambridge’s Energy and Environment group trained TESSERA on 16 AMD Instinct MI300X GPUs, using roughly 6,200 GPU-hours and AMD’s open ROCm software.
caption: output/2026-07-23/cambridge-built-a-planet-scale-ai-model-and-skipped-nvidia-to-do-it.txt
